MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY B OARD) NOTIFICATION‘ New Delhi, the 12th May, 2016 GSJR. 500(E).——-In exercise of the powers conferred to clause 0:) of sub—section (2) of section 30, read with section 30A of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), fihe Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, Vice—Chaiman and Members) Rules, 1989, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tfibunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, VicerChairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall be deemed to have come into force on the 24'11 day of September, 2012. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1.989, in rule 8, after sub-rule (2), the following sub—rules shall be inserted, namelyz— ‘ -- 2 of 3 -- [WWII~1§I'"33(1)] ‘i’Rfi 725T WW : WWW! ‘ - 3 "(3) Thefamily ofa Member shall be entitled to family pension in the event ofhis death,~ (i) while in service irrespective oflength afservioe in the Tribunal; or (ii) after retirement from the Tribunal in case he has been drawing pension from the Tribunal. (4) Family pension under sub—rule (3) shall. be calculated at the rate of sixty per cent of the admissible pension drawn by him for service rendered in the Tribunal. (5) In the event ofdeath ofa Member while in service before completion ofminimum period of two years’ service in the Tribunal, family pension shall befixed at the rate ofsixty per cent of the admissible pensionfor two years’ service in the Tribunal. Provided that the aggregate ofall types offamily pensien, payable to the family of a Member, shall not exceed sixty per cent of the maximum pension payable to such Member. ” [No. 2012/TC(RCT)/4~3/CA,—Ill] RAVINESH KUMAR, Executive Director (Public Grievances), Railway Board Explanatory Memorandum In View of relaxation being extended to grant double or multiple family pension by Department of Pension and Pensioners’ Welfare to the Central Government employees, the same benefit is being extended to the Members of Railway Claims Tribunal also vide this amendment to the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Services of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989. In line with that of the Central Government employees, the financial benefit in respect of the Members of the‘Railway Claims Tribunal shall be made effective retrospectively from the 24'“ September, 2012 onwards. It is certified that, by giving this notification retrospective effect, no Member shall be adversely affected. Note :~ The principal rules were published vidc notification number G.SlR. 844(E), dated the 19“I September, 1989 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R 726(B), dated the 60‘ December, 1991, G.S.R. 185(E), dated the 11'“ April, 1996, G.S.R. 436(E), dated the 26‘“ September, 1996, G.S,R. 563(E), dated the 7"h September, 1998, G.S.R. 9603), dated the 10'h February, 1999, G.S.R. 835(E), dated the 30“I December, 1999, G.S.R. 733(E), dated the 21St September, 2000, G.S.R. 386(E), dated the 25‘“ May, 2001, G.S.R. 206(E), dated the 11‘“ March, 2002, (15.11. 625(E), dated the 29“1 August, .2008, G.S.R. 797(E), dated the 18'“ November, 2008, G.S.R. 82803), dated the 12‘“ November, 2009. G.S.R. 796(E), dated the 13‘“ November, 2014. and G.S.R. 1303), dated the 6‘“ January, 2015.
